name: phpdftk/paged-media
description: CSS Paged Media 3 + Generated Content for Paged Media 3 + Fragmentation 3/4 engine — page boxes, named pages, page selectors, @page margin boxes (16 positions), marginalia, running elements, fragmentation across pages and columns. Extracted from phpdftk/html-to-pdf so phpdftk/svg-to-pdf (foreignObject) and direct callers can reuse the same paged-media logic.
